About Dream Black Horse - Our Story & Mission

A legacy of excellence in equestrian breeding, training, and care spanning over three decades

Our Story

Bridging the Gap in the Friesian Horse Market

DreamBlackHorse originated as a humble family farm fueled by a profound admiration for the majestic Friesian breed. Over the years, our passion evolved into a lifelong journey of connecting exceptional horses with loving owners across the globe.

Recognizing the challenges many faced in finding authentic, high-caliber Friesians, we dedicated ourselves to directly importing the finest bloodlines from the Netherlands. We carefully select each horse based on uncompromising standards of quality, elite pedigree, and outstanding performance potential.

Our Mission

To carefully breed, raise, and deliver premium Friesian horses to passionate equestrians globally, upholding the highest standards of health, temperament, and authentic lineage.

Our Values

The principles that guide every decision we make

Excellence

We maintain the highest standards in breeding, training, and care

Passion

Our love for horses drives everything we do

Partnership

Building lasting relationships with our clients and their horses

Integrity

Honest, transparent, and ethical in all our practices

FHANA Ride and Drive Service Areas

We pride ourselves to be a major player in the Friesian industry, importing directly from Friesland. Whether you're looking for a Friesian stallion, Friesian mare, or Friesian foal, our long-lasting experience and trusted equine connections created over the years guarantee us a global network. Distance is never an obstacle to finding your dream horse.

Nationwide Coverage

From coast to coast, we coordinate professional transport to any state or province.

Safe & Secure

Our transport partners use air-ride suspension trailers with video monitoring.

Flexible Scheduling

Weekly routes available to major equestrian hubs across North America.

Meet Our Team

Expert professionals dedicated to excellence

Patrick Everson.

Facility Manager.

Experienced Facility Manager responsible for ensuring the smooth operation, maintenance, and safety of buildings and infrastructure. Focused on efficiency, compliance, and service quality, with a strong ability to manage teams and optimize facility performance.

Debbie Channel

Lead trainer

Lead Trainer focused on producing disciplined horses and skilled riders through consistent, hands-on training and proven techniques.

Jamia Gibbs

Sales specialist

Sales Specialist with expertise in equine sales, client relations, and stable services. Experienced in matching clients with the right horses, managing sales processes, and promoting stable offerings with a strong focus on customer satisfaction and long-term relationships.

DreamBlackHorse

Premium horse breeding and sales. Excellence in equestrian tradition.
